prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Transformer T-018 has a sudden hydrogen increase relative to baseline. Determine the likely root cause class and recommend one confirmatory measurement.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should classify the likely failure/root-cause class from gas behavior and propose one concrete confirmatory measurement or inspection step.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)

    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",

      {
        "name": "analyze_dga",
        "arguments": {
          "h2": 100,
          "ch4": 50,
          "c2h2": 20,
          "c2h4": 10,
          "c2h6": 5,
          "transformer_id": "T-018"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-8bdd3f91854259fc",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"iec_code\": \"D2\",\n  \"diagnosis\": \"Discharges of high energy (arcing)\",\n  \"r1_ch4_h2\": 0.5,\n  \"r2_c2h2_c2h4\": 2.0,\n  \"r3_c2h4_c2h6\": 2.0,\n  \"input_gases\": {\n    \"h2_ppm\": 100.0,\n    \"ch4_ppm\": 50.0,\n    \"c2h2_ppm\": 20.0,\n    \"c2h4_ppm\": 10.0,\n    \"c2h6_ppm\": 5.0\n  },\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-018\"\n}"
        }

    ]

    "content": "To recommend one confirmatory measurement for the likely root cause class (Discharges of high energy (arcing)), I would suggest measuring the Acetylene (C2H2) concentration. This is because the analysis indicates a high ratio of C2H2 to C2H4 (R2), which is a characteristic of arcing discharges.\n\nTherefore, the confirmatory measurement would be: \"Acetylene (C2H2) concentration\".",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
To recommend one confirmatory measurement for the likely root cause class (Discharges of high energy (arcing)), I would suggest measuring the Acetylene (C2H2) concentration. This is because the analysis indicates a high ratio of C2H2 to C2H4 (R2), which is a characteristic of arcing discharges.

Therefore, the confirmatory measurement would be: "Acetylene (C2H2) concentration".

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
